displayTitle: Free Comic Book Day 2025: Star Wars #1
synopsis:
A one-shot comic written by Alex Segura, Charles Soule, and Marc Guggenheim and illustrated by Phil Noto, Luke Ross, Stefano Raffaele, and Madibek Musabekov.

Celebrating the new era of Star Wars comics! Luke Skywalker finds himself in a wretched hive of scum and villainy facing off against pirates! Jedi Knights Qui-Gon Jinn & Tensu Run are on the hunt for the villainous Corlis Rath! Who is the mysterious Vaneé [sic] and what is his connection to Darth Vader & Kylo Ren?

Contents
- Untitled Luke Skywalker story
- Untitled Jedi Knights story
- Untitled Vaneé story
title: Free Comic Book Day 2025: Star Wars #1
